song.title: My Heart is Hungry, My Spirit doth Thirst
song.author: Witness Lee
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C V5 C V6 C V7 C V8 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] . G D7 G My heart is hungry, my spirit doth thirst; . Em C A7 D I come to Thee, Lord, to seek Thy supply; .G C G All that I need is none other but Thee, . D7 G D7 G Thou canst my hunger and thirst satisfy.
[C] .G D7 Em B7 Feed me, Lord Jesus, give me to drink, . C G D7 Fill all my hunger, quench all my thirst; . G C Flood me with joy, be the strength of my life, . G D7 G Fill all my hunger, quench all my thirst.
[V2] Thou art the food and the water of life, Thou canst revive me, my spirit upbear; I long to eat and to drink here of Thee, Thyself enjoy through my reading and prayer.
[V3] Thou art the Word with God’s fullness in Thee, Thou too the Spirit that God my life be; Thee in the Word I enjoy as my food, Thou as the Spirit art water to me.
[V4] Thou from the heavens as food camest down, Thou to be drink hast been smitten for me; Thou as the food, my exhaustless supply, Thou as the water, a stream unto me.
[V5] Thou in the Word art the Spirit and life, Thus by the Word I may feed upon Thee; Thou dost as Spirit in my spirit live, Thus I may drink in the spirit of Thee.
[V6] Now to enjoy Thee I come to Thy Word, On Thee to feed till my hunger is o’er. Now in my spirit I turn unto Thee, Of Thee to drink till I’m thirsty no more.
[V7] Feeding and drinking, Lord Jesus, of Thee, Feeding by reading, and drinking by prayer; Reading and praying, I eat and I drink, Praying and reading - Lord, Thou art my fare.
[V8] Here, O my Lord, may I feast upon Thee; Flood with Thy Spirit and fill by Thy Word; May, Lord, Thou be such a feast unto me As man hath never enjoyed nor e’er heard.
